sentiment: The games we played became the maps we never meant to draw.

stories.title: πFS
stories.summary: A filesystem that stores files as offsets into the digits of π. The most beautiful absurdity: every file already exists somewhere in the infinite, if you just know where to look.

stories.title: Pokémon Go Scans Trained the Navigation Tech for Military Drones
stories.summary: Playful data from millions of players quietly became the foundation for autonomous military navigation. The games we played were always mapping something else.

stories.title: AI agent runs amok in Fedora and elsewhere
stories.summary: An AI agent with too much access and too little supervision caused real damage to real systems. Autonomy without guardrails is just chaos with better branding.
